title: Figma tokens should not be disclosed
description: In most cases, trust boundaries are violated when a secret is exposed in a source code repository or an uncontrolled deployment environment. Unintended people who don't need to know the secret might get access to it. They might then be able to use it to gain unwanted access to associated services or resources.
recommendation: Review and fix according to the rule guidelines.

checks.message: Figma Personal Access Token detected (figd_ prefix). Figma personal access tokens grant full access to your Figma account including all files, projects, teams, and organizational data. Exposing this token allows attackers to read proprietary designs and prototypes, access confidential project assets, modify or delete design files, export design assets, and access comments and project history. Revoke immediately at figma.com/settings under Personal Access Tokens.

Figma access token detected in variable assignment. Figma tokens authenticate API requests to access design files, components, variables, and project data. Exposing these tokens allows unauthorized access to all designs the account can view, including confidential product designs, brand assets, and intellectual property. Revoke at figma.com/settings and audit recent file access.

Figma API token detected in X-Figma-Token HTTP header. The X-Figma-Token header is used to authenticate requests to Figma's REST API. Exposing this header value enables unauthorized reading and manipulation of your Figma design files, projects, and team resources.
